issues.recommendation: Removed/demo URLs must return 410 or 404 with X-Robots-Tag for deindexing.

issues.message: Production /shop returned HTTP 308; /shop must not redirect.
issues.recommendation: Deploy current Vercel routing so /shop returns 410/noindex.

seo.blocked_reason: Client-rendered CRA book pages need prerender/SSR/static snapshots for durable book SEO.

issues.message: Book detail metadata is generated client-side after API load in the CRA app.
issues.recommendation: For 9.7+ launch SEO, prerender/SSR/static-snapshot priority book pages so crawlers receive book-specific metadata.

recommendations: Add server-rendered copy for priority public pages before major SEO launch.
Keep Start Reading as primary CTA and Buy Reading Time as monetization CTA.
Add explicit institution pilot CTA to homepage once the operator has a staffed response path.
Keep pricing trust/refund/support copy visible above checkout start.

classification_policy.KEEP: Linked book has approved rights and QA-passed audio.
classification_policy.REMASTER: Rights pass but audio QA or mastering needs improvement.
classification_policy.REGENERATE: Narration quality or sync is below launch threshold.
classification_policy.UNPUBLISH: Audio is public without rights/QA linkage.
classification_policy.RIGHTS_REVIEW: Linked book lacks approved source/rights evidence.

issues.message: 5 public audiobook assets lack linked approved rights evidence.
issues.recommendation: Keep public audio out of launch promotion until book rights and audio provenance are verified.

issues.message: 5 public audiobook assets need listening/sync/waveform QA.
issues.recommendation: Complete audio QA before marking audiobook pages launch-ready.

operator_follow_up: Run a separate controlled Razorpay test-mode checkout with a throwaway user before revenue launch.
Verify wallet credit, webhook idempotency, payment_failed analytics, and post-payment return UX in production.

issues.message: Payment tests exist but live Razorpay production payment flow was not executed in Phase 13.
issues.recommendation: Run a controlled Razorpay test-mode payment smoke before revenue launch.

privacy.pii_policy: Event schemas should use anonymous/session IDs and sanitized metadata only.

issues.message: Missing canonical growth events: page_view, book_view, preview_start, reading_started, reading_session_completed, newsletter_joined, referral_invited, referral_converted, institution_interest, audio_preview_played, cta_clicked.
issues.recommendation: Instrument canonical launch events before paid acquisition or broad onboarding.
